## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` clean (if touching Python)
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` clean (if touching Python)
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if adding env vars)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/*.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or `.env.local` files committed
- [ ] robots.txt compliance preserved — no scraping of disallowed API endpoints
